creator: khorben@defora.org
text: Since bsdconfig may be presumed as always available, and uses xdialog when invoked for use as a graphical interface (ie with -X), this package may just as well expose bsdconfig to the end user. This also installs a scaled-down copy of the FreeBSD logo from /boot/images for use as its icon (48 pixels tall and wide), where the trademark sign was removed since it is unrecognizable as this scale. Finally, this also documents the requirements in pkg-message. (Running as root or being a sudoer)
